reviews.comment:
La atención excelente, la chica es super amable. Pedimos hamburguesas y las hicieron rápido, nos cargaron el termo gratis por ser socios del ACA (no sabíamos ese dato hasta que nos lo dijo la chica). Muy lindo el lugar también

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, the girl was super friendly. We ordered hamburgers and they made them quickly, and they filled our thermos for free because we're ACA members (we didn't know that until the girl told us). The place is very nice too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2c0xhUEt3EAE

reviews.comment:
